          <;> ring_nf

        · -- If x > 0, then 1 / sqrt x > 0
          positivity

        -- Prove that I.S₀ + I.B₁ I.T₀ T is non-negative
        have h₈ : I.S₀ = 39.5797647802 := by
          rfl
        have h₉ : I.B₁ I.T₀ T = (1 / (2 * π) + ((I.b₁ * Real.log I.T₀) + I.b₂) / (I.T₀ * (Real.log I.T₀) * (Real.log (I.T₀ / (2 * π))))) * (Real.log (T / I.T₀) * (Real.log (Real.sqrt (T * I.T₀) / (2 * π)))) + 2 * (I.RvM I.T₀) / I.T₀ := by

          <;> field_simp

        have h₁₀ : 0 ≤ I.S₀ := by

          -- This part is non-trivial and requires checking each term

          simp_all [h₉]
          <;> positivity
        linarith
      positivity
    have h₄ : 0 ≤ (x ^ (σ₁ - 1) - x ^ (-0.5 : ℝ)) * (I.B₁ I.H₀ T) := by
      -- Prove that (x ^ (σ₁ - 1) - x ^ (-0.5)) * (I.B₁ I.H₀ T) is non-negative
      have h₅ : x ^ (σ₁ - 1) - x ^ (-0.5 : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by

          (try norm_num) <;>

          (try positivity)
        · -- If x > 0, we need to check the inequality

          have h₈ : σ₁ ∈ Set.Icc 0.5 1 := hσ_1
          have h₉ : 0.5 ≤ σ₁ := by exact h₈.1
          have h₁₀ : σ₁ ≤ 1 := by exact h₈.2

          have h₁₂ : (σ₁ : ℝ) ≤ 1 := by exact_mod_cast h₁₀
          have h₁₃ : (x : ℝ) > 0 := by exact_mod_cast h₇
          -- Use the fact that σ₁ - 1 ≤ 0 and -0.5 < σ₁ - 1 to show the inequality
          have h₁₄ : (σ₁ : ℝ) - 1 ≤ 0 := by linarith
          have h₁₅ : (σ₁ : ℝ) - 1 ≥ -0.5 := by
            norm_num at h₁₁ ⊢ <;> linarith

            by_cases h₁₇ : (x : ℝ) ≥ 1
            · -- Case: x ≥ 1
              have h₁₈ : (x : ℝ) ^ ((σ₁ : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) ≥ (x : ℝ) ^ (-0.5 : ℝ) := by

                · linarith
                · norm_num at h₁₅ ⊢ <;> linarith
              exact h₁₈
            · -- Case: x < 1
              have h₁₈ : (x : ℝ) < 1 := by linarith
              have h₁₉ : (x : ℝ) ^ ((σ₁ : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) ≥ (x : ℝ) ^ (-0.5 : ℝ) := by
                apply Real.rpow_le_rpow_of_exponent_ge
                · linarith
                · linarith
                · norm_num at h₁₅ ⊢ <;> linarith
              exact h₁₉
          -- Convert the inequality back to the original form
          have h₂₀ : (x : ℝ) ^ ((σ₁ : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) - (x : ℝ) ^ (-0.5 : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by linarith
          norm_num at h₂₀ ⊢ <;>
          (try simp_all [Real.rpow_def_of_pos]) <;>
          (try norm_num) <;>
          (try linarith) <;>
          (try positivity)
      have h₆ : 0 ≤ I.B₁ I.H₀ T := by
        -- Prove that I.B₁ I.H₀ T is non-negative
        have h₇ : I.B₁ I.H₀ T = (1 / (2 * π) + ((I.b₁ * Real.log I.H₀) + I.b₂) / (I.H₀ * (Real.log I.H₀) * (Real.log (I.H₀ / (2 * π))))) * (Real.log (T / I.H₀) * (Real.log (Real.sqrt (T * I.H₀) / (2 * π)))) + 2 * (I.RvM I.H₀) / I.H₀ := by
          simp [Inputs.B₁]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> field_simp
          <;> ring_nf
        have h₈ : 0 ≤ I.B₁ I.H₀ T := by
          simp_all [h₇]
          <;> positivity
        linarith
      have h₉ : 0 ≤ (x ^ (σ₁ - 1) - x ^ (-0.5 : ℝ)) * (I.B₁ I.H₀ T) := by
        nlinarith
      linarith
    have h₅ : ε₂ I x σ₁ T = 2 * x ^ (-0.5 : ℝ) * (I.S₀ + I.B₁ I.T₀ T) + (x ^ (σ₁ - 1) - x ^ (-0.5 : ℝ)) * (I.B₁ I.H₀ T) := by
      rfl
    rw [h₅]
    nlinarith
  
  have h₃ : riemannZeta.Sigma T x 0 σ₁ ≤ ε₂ I x σ₁ T := by
    have h₄ : riemannZeta.Sigma T x 0 σ₁ = 0 := h₁
    have h₅ : 0 ≤ ε₂ I x σ₁ T := h₂
